Actions.Text: REPORTED AND COMMITTED TO CONSUMER PROTECTION

Title: Requires the testing of baby food and infant formula for toxic heavy metals and the disclosure of such test results
Summary: Enacts the "Baby Food and Infant Formula Safety and Transparency Act"; requires the testing of baby food and infant formula for toxic heavy metals and the disclosure of such test results.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the agriculture and markets law, in relation to requiring the testing of baby food and infant formula for toxic heavy metals and the disclosure of such test results
